text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition to her early morning sessions, Kitasan Black has been
dedicating every minute of her free time to training.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I can still run! Come on, Trainer, just a little while longer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It'll be fine! See, I'm fit as a fiddle. I won't waste even a second of
your time, Trainer! So let's keep going!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kita runs off with tremendous speed. Underneath her hyped-up
attitude, I can also sense a hint of desperation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "I won't waste even a second of your time," huh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe the training program I created for her ended up backfiring
and putting pressure on her instead.
choice_data_list: (I can't let things stay like this...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't want her to feel pressured to run. I want her to improve slowly
but surely, running in the way that best suits her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Tomorrow, you want to go see... the autumn leaves? Weren't we
going to train? What happened?
choice_data_list: I was thinking it'd be a nice change of pace.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: A change of pace...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I-I get it! You must be exhausted! Right, that totally makes sense.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Aw, maaan. I can't believe I didn't notice until now!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I understand! Let's change our pace, pronto!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Like blam—relaxation! Just leave it all to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start to wonder if Kita knows how to relax. Putting that aside, the
two of us make plans to go see the autumn leaves tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? That person over there...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, are you okay? You look like you might be lost...

text_block_list.name: Lost Woman
text_block_list.text: Ah... Th-that's right.

text_block_list.name: Lost Woman
text_block_list.text:
I had my friend draw me a map, but since I'm not familiar with this
area, it's not helping me out much.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Give me one second. This is the station, sooo... Ah, this might be a
bit tricky. It's a little ways away, so I'll—

text_block_list.name: Lost Woman
text_block_list.text: You will? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text: Hah... Upsy-daisy... Wh-whoa there...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Careful! You're carrying an awful lot of stuff, mister.

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry for the scare. I thought I'd buy some gifts for my
grandchildren, but I may have bitten off more than I can chew...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You want your goods on the luggage rack, right? Don't worry, I got
this—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ah...
choice_data_list: Let us know when we're at your station.

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text: Hey, I appreciate it. Thank you very kindly.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whoa, so pretty! And so many colors, too!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I love that crunchy sound the leaves make underfoot! Come on,
Trainer, let's go check out over there.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: The view from here is amazing! Wait! I see a dango stand over there!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Do you see it, Trainer? Right on that hill...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like going to see the autumn leaves really did make for a nice
change of pace. That said, it's tough at times to keep up with Kita's
bubbly energy.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, you're drenched in sweat... H-how are you holding up, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I'll be fine with some rest.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You're only tired because I dragged you around today!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And before we even got here... You know, um... I made you help
those people out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since I was already there, it only made sense for me to help out where
I could. Not to mention...
choice_data_list: I was happy to help out.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, that's not the issue! I mean, I am super-duper happy to hear
that, though!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's just... I wanted you to rest up more today, since I'm sure you're
tired from training me...
choice_data_list: True, I might have to work on my stamina...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Nnngh! You already have plenty, trust me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You're not only at all of my training sessions, but you also keep up
with my running on your bike!
choice_data_list: Of course. I'm your trainer, after all.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Th-that might be true, but I don't want to... take it for... Mmgh...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...What should I do? I'm always... the only one being supported...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (Sigh... Dad... It's hard supporting someone, isn't it?)
